_publications._publicationTitle: Clinician Perspectives of a Magnetic Resonance Imaging-Based 3D Volumetric Analysis Tool for Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Related Schwannomatosis: Qualitative Pilot Study.

_contextSnippet: Some statements regarding the benefits or potential use of 3D volumetric analysis or 3D visualizations were met with hesitancy, with average agreement levels nearing 3.0 (neither disagree nor agree)
details: Captured clinician agreement levels with average scores around 3.0 (neither disagree nor agree) for statements about 3D volumetric measurements needing visualization (mean 3.07, SD 0.92), 3D models leading to more informed decisions (mean 3.00, SD 1.41), and 3D visualization aiding surgical planning (mean 3.20, SD 1.30)
